revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a crisp 16-bit SNES-style pixel-art terrain overlay tileset for a game asset.

Canvas and grid are mandatory: final image size exactly 64x64 pixels, arranged as a strict 4x4 grid. Each cell is exactly 16x16 pixels. No visible grid lines, no borders, no labels, no tile IDs, no text, no UI, no watermark. Every decoration must stay fully inside its own 16x16 cell and keep a consistent small centered scale with generous empty margin.

Background: every cell must be filled edge-to-edge with solid #FF00FF magenta in all empty space, suitable for chroma key transparency. The decorations are overlay tiles layered over base terrain.

Style: bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette, soft warm golden-hour sunlight, hand-painted Ghibli-like feeling while remaining crisp low-resolution pixel art. No antialiasing blur. Consistent palette, readable fine pixel clusters, dark one-pixel outline where useful, top-left light source, cheerful saturated colors. Think world-map decoration accents, not close-up village grass. Avoid repeated square stamps and high-frequency checkerboard texture.

Place exactly one small decoration item near the center of each cell:
Row 1: cell 0 dense round clump of tiny mixed yellow-and-white wildflowers with lush green stems; cell 1 sprig of bright pink nadeshiko with fine grass blades; cell 2 two smooth grey-green river pebbles with a tiny moss tuft between them; cell 3 low leafy dark-green herb shrub with small white flowers.
Row 2: cell 4 clump of sharp pointed sasa bamboo-grass blades leaning slightly; cell 5 tangled cluster of fine grass roots and low soil with tiny mushroom; cell 6 spreading low green moss patch on dark soil with tiny fern frond; cell 7 three slender reed stems with feathery brown tops, ashi reeds.
Row 3: cell 8 lotus or lily pad on a shallow water patch, round green leaf with tiny water drop; cell 9 clump of muddy wet grass at a bank edge, darker earth visible; cell 10 tangle of fine water-grass and a small reed bud; cell 11 single water-worn flat stone half-covered in bright green algae.
Row 4: cell 12 compact low dark-green leafy bush with small purple berries; cell 13 drooping fern frond over dark soil; cell 14 delicate spray of white small cherry-blossom petals scattered on soil; cell 15 low twisting dark root knot with tiny moss growing along it.

Avoid: no characters, no creatures, no birds, no companion animals, no Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna characters, logos, or likenesses; no samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, letter emblems, text, watermark, or UI.

Output only the one PNG image.
